general: No capital allocation without Risk Engine approval
No protocol configuration changes without authorization
No contract or infrastructure deployment without authorization
tradingRisk: Recommend routes and trade sizing only
Borrow/lending requires DD/Risk Agent and Risk Engine validation
Never bypass risk limits, kill switches, or daily loss limits
Pause recommendations when market or data confidence is low
dataQuality: Detect stale or missing data and flag it
Escalate conflicting signals instead of guessing

mentors.claude: Education and documentation only — no production changes or deployments
mentors.hermes: Code review and templates only — no auto-modify production or deployments

security: No private keys or wallet secrets

excludedFromAutomatedAlerts: Profit/loss standups and evening financial summaries
slack.recommendedSetup: One Slack app → main orchestrator. Specialists post engineering intelligence (routes, risk, liquidity, data health) — not daily revenue rollups during deployment phase.

interaction.dm: DM the bot for full MOR intelligence reviews
interaction.channel: @mention the bot in a channel (invite bot first)

samplePrompts.fullReview: Engineering intelligence roundtable: spawn all specialists, pull /api/agents/context. Synthesize route quality, risk posture, data freshness, and top 3 engineering actions. No revenue rollup.
samplePrompts.routeQuality: Spawn mor-pnl: route quality and opportunity scoring (PRIORITIZE/RETIRE) with confidence — not daily PnL.
samplePrompts.riskAlert: Spawn mor-dd-risk: borrow/lending health and failure patterns. BLOCK or REDUCE if thresholds breached.
samplePrompts.marketMode: Spawn mor-market-mode: market observations and deployment tier (BASELINE/BURST/5×/10×).
samplePrompts.opsHealth: Spawn mor-ops: data freshness, execution latency, failed execution diagnostics, infrastructure health.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Engineering Roundtable
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR engineering roundtable: each specialist posts on Slack and follows up on prior agents. Pull GET /api/agents/context. Commander synthesizes: route quality, risk posture, data freshness, deployment tier, agent tensions, top 3 engineering actions. No revenue or daily PnL rollup. Never execute trades.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Route Quality Scan
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR route quality scan: GET /api/agents/context. Output PRIORITIZE/RETIRE with opportunity scores, failure patterns, cross-chain notes. Do not lead with dollar PnL or revenue.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR DD/Risk Alert
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR DD/Risk alert: GET /api/agents/context. Borrow/lending health, utilization, collateral. Output APPROVE/REDUCE/BLOCK. No PnL rollup.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Market Observations
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR market observations: classify BASELINE/BURST/5×/10× with route-quality, liquidity, and DD scores. Cross-chain context. No revenue rollup.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Liquidity Analysis
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR liquidity analysis: SAFE SIZE / REDUCE SIZE / AVOID ROUTE per route. Pool depth, slippage, cross-chain migration signals.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Capital Ladder Engineering
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR capital ladder engineering brief: tier posture, allocation logic, SCALE/PAUSE with risk alignment. Buffer % if SCALE — no daily revenue rollup.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Ops & Data Freshness
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR ops watch: GET /api/agents/context. Data freshness flags, API health, execution latency, failed execution diagnostics, infrastructure signals. Optional prompt-improvement note.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Governance Watch
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR governance watch: active proposals, timelocks, operational impact on routes and risk. MONITOR/PREPARE/URGENT — no financial rollup.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Smart Router Scan
alertCronJobs.prompt: MOR smart router scan: GET /api/agents/context. Use smartRouter.recommendations — output ROUTE/AVOID with confidence, success probability, execution priority. Never rank by quoted spread alone.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Flashloan Opportunity Scan
alertCronJobs.prompt: Evaluate live Smart Router candidates for flashloan viability. Post the deterministic result as MOR Smart Router. When routes qualify, have MOR PnL Intel, MOR Liquidity, and MOR Risk Guard discuss expected realized profit, quote freshness, liquidity, safe size, gas, fees, and execution risk in the same Slack thread; Commander posts the final recommend-only synthesis. Risk Engine approval is required.

alertCronJobs.name: MOR Hermes Engineering Review
alertCronJobs.prompt: Hermes engineering review: GET /api/agents/context. REVIEW agent framework, dataQuality flags, prompt gaps. OPTIMIZE observability. TEMPLATE any prompt fixes. No production changes claimed.

agents.name: MOR Orchestrator
agents.slackRole: Primary Slack contact — delegates to specialists via sub-agents
agents.kpi: Route requests and synthesize specialist alerts

agents.name: PnL Intelligence
agents.slackRole: Route quality and opportunity scoring — engineering phase (no daily PnL rollup)

agents.name: Smart Router
agents.slackRole: Execution-quality route ranking — confidence and success probability over spread
agents.kpi: Maximize realized net profit via selective high-confidence routing

agents.name: Liquidity Intelligence
agents.slackRole: Liquidity analysis and safe sizing alerts
agents.kpi: Maximum safe capital without reducing profitability

agents.name: DD / Risk
agents.slackRole: DD/Risk and borrow/lending health alerts — highest urgency
agents.kpi: Protect treasury while enabling safe scaling

agents.name: Market Mode
agents.slackRole: Market observations and deployment tier alerts

agents.name: Capital Ladder
agents.slackRole: Capital ladder recommendations — tier and allocation logic (no revenue rollup)
agents.kpi: Compound treasury growth from validated data

agents.name: Governance Intelligence
agents.kpi: Timely governance visibility before treasury moves

agents.name: Ops / Health Watch
agents.slackRole: Data freshness, execution latency, failure diagnostics, infrastructure health
agents.kpi: Reliable observability for all intelligence agents

agents.name: Hermes
agents.slackRole: Code review, optimizations, failure explanations, prompt templates — no auto-modify production
agents.kpi: Improve prompts, code, and workflows through mentor feedback only

cronJobs.name: MOR GitHub Audit Sweep
cronJobs.prompt: MOR GitHub audit sweep: review the latest GitHub review context if available, otherwise inspect the current repo diff and recent engineering changes. Post a structured PASS/WARN/FAIL/NEEDS_HUMAN audit in #mor-audit with file-specific risks and required follow-ups.

cronJobs.name: MOR GitHub Suggestion Sweep
cronJobs.prompt: MOR GitHub suggestion sweep: review the latest GitHub context, working-tree diff, and MOR system state. Share 3-7 ranked engineering suggestions in #mor-suggestion with impact, effort, and recommended owners.

cronJobs.name: MOR GitHub Agents Collaboration
cronJobs.prompt: MOR GitHub agents collaboration: run a full Hermes ↔ MOR engineering discussion over the latest GitHub context, active repo changes, and MOR live context. Have agents interact in #mor-agents and synthesize next actions for the team.
